title: Multi-target dispatch manifest
description: Live coordination state for a multi-business/squad/agent-x dispatch. Created by the orchestrator at .nirvana/outputs/<trace_id>/manifest.json and updated as each phase completes.

brief_path.description: Relative path to brief-enriched.md from the project_dir root.

parallel_waves.description: Ordered list of phase-id groups. All phases within a group may run in parallel. Each wave runs after the previous one completes.

runtime.description: Required when type='agent-x' (claude-code, codex, antigravity-cli, gemini-cli).

outputs_path.description: Relative path to the target's outputs directory (e.g., 'businesses/<slug>/outputs/').

outputs_summary_path.description: Relative path to the 1-page exec summary the target writes at completion. Convention: '<outputs_path>/_SUMMARY.md'.

dispatch_instruction_path.description: Relative path to the DISPATCH-INSTRUCTION.md the orchestrator wrote for this phase.

handoff_path.description: Relative path to the phase-tracking HANDOFF.json.

depends_on.description: phase-ids that must complete before this phase starts.

consumed_by.description: phase-ids that will read this phase's outputs (informational, helps the phase shape its outputs).

writes_paths.description: Glob patterns this phase will write to (used by race-detector when parallelizing siblings).

audit_events.description: Recent audit events for this phase. Tail of the global audit log filtered by trace_id + phase_id.
